channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! launches March 26 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
Fast-paced action sports game dated.

Fast-paced action sports game Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! will launch for Switch and PC via Steam on March 26, publisher and developer Tatsumaki Games and developer Mankind Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

All your favorite Sanrio characters come together in a fast-paced action sports game that mixes tennis-style rallies with hockey-like speed. Easy to pick up and play, but use stage gimmicks and character abilities to enjoy deeper, more strategic matches!

Over 20 Unique Playable Characters!

With over 20 playable characters, each one comes with their own unique stats—like movement speed, shot power, and lob shot range.

Try them all, find the character that fits your playstyle best, and have a blast!

Packed Single-Player Mode

Jump into Solo Mode and aim for the championship with your favorite character! There are 50 stages in total, offering tons of content.

Beat the final stage and keep playing—the CPU difficulty increases with each loop, so the challenge never ends! Train hard and show off your skills to your friends.

Tons of Local and Online Multiplayer Fun

  • Local Play
    • Supports up to four players!
    • Get together with family and friends for 1v1 Singles or 2v2 Doubles matches and hype things up!
  • Online Matches
    • Play against others across Japan in Random Match, or enjoy private games with friends in Room Match.
  • Room Match Feature
    • Just enter a room number and jump straight into a match—even with friends far away!

55 Stages That Change the Game!

Battle it out across 55 different stages, each packed with unique gimmicks! Breakable blocks, unpredictable mechanics, and all kinds of wild combinations will keep you on your toes.

Will you push aggressively toward the goal? Or use the stage gimmicks for a more tactical play? Find your own way to win!



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/sanrio-characters-smash-festa-launches-march-26-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy launches March 24
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

Six more characters join the fray.

Three-versus-three team boss battle arena game Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy will launch for iOS via App Store and Android via Google Play on March 24, developers Square Enix and NHN PlayArt announced.

The launch trailer also reveals six additional characters: Firion from Final Fantasy II, Onion Knight from Final Fantasy III, Rikku from Final Fantasy X, Iroha from Final Fantasy XI, Balthier from Final Fantasy XII, and Clive Rosfield from Final Fantasy XVI.

Here is an overview of the game, via its store pages:

About

Warriors from the Final Fantasy series assemble in modern-day Tokyo to save the world from destruction in Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy.

Fight in three-versus-three battles where two teams fight monsters and clash in a race to defeat the powerful boss faster than the enemy team!

Key Features

  • Legendary Final Fantasy Characters – Fight as one of several legendary Final Fantasy warriors like Warrior of Light, Cloud, Lightning, and more, and take on the role of either Melee, Ranged, Agile, or Support. Choose the character that matches your playstyle and work as a team to take on powerful monsters! (More characters will be added over a period of time.)
  • Exhilarating Action – Acquire various abilities and unleash them in battle to gain the upper hand. Customize your loadout from an array of abilities, including numerous newly drawn illustrations by a stellar team of artists.
  • Easy-to-Learn Controls – Play with simple controls anywhere and on-the-go! Change the control scheme to one that suits you best from various control settings.
  • Modern Story – Explore a new Dissidia story unfolding in modern-day Tokyo with Final Fantasy warriors brought to life with full Japanese voice acting and beautiful cel-shaded graphics. Get a glimpse into their daily lives and interactions with one another by watching chat messenger episodes.
  • Customization and Community – Show off your style by outfitting Final Fantasy characters in their original looks or new clothes fit to roam around the modern world! Collect original and arranged music tracks from your favorite Final Fantasy games, edit your profile, chat with other players, and join the ultimate Final Fantasy community!

Watch the launch trailer below.

Launch Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/dissidia-duellum-final-fantasy-launches-march-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Classics adds Pokemon XD: Gale of Darkness
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Fight against an evil organization using Shadow Pokemon.

Pokemon XD: Gale of Darkness is now available via the Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Classics app for Switch 2, Nintendo announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via the back of its box:

Experience The Extra Dimension!

Using Shadow Pokemon, an evil organization has unleashed a sinister plot of world domination. With Eevee as your companion, and with the help of numerous friends along the way, you must fight against terrible foes and race against time to snag and purify the Shadow Pokemon and save the world!

Watch a trailer below.

Launch Trailer

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nintendo-gamecube-nintendo-classics-adds-pokemon-xd-gale-of-darkness
